chunks.title: Divine Warning to Rehoboam
chunks.reason: Contains the oracle from Yahweh through Shemaiah instructing Rehoboam not to fight Israel.

chunks.title: Rehoboam's Fortifications
chunks.reason: Describes the building of fortified cities and military preparations in Judah.

chunks.title: Levites Join Rehoboam
chunks.reason: Narrates the migration of priests and Levites to Judah and their strengthening of the kingdom.

chunks.title: Rehoboam's Family and Succession
chunks.reason: Details Rehoboam's wives, children, and his plan for succession among his sons.
